pinpoint.campaign.campaignemailmessage.B.Docs: The body of the email for recipients whose email clients don't render HTML content.

pinpoint.campaign.campaignemailmessage.F.Docs: The verified email address to send the email from. The default address is the `FromAddress` specified for the email channel for the application.

pinpoint.campaign.campaignemailmessage.H.Docs: The body of the email, in HTML format, for recipients whose email clients render HTML content.

pinpoint.campaign.campaignemailmessage.T.Docs: The subject line, or title, of the email.
